LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_a.label: Kakistos Coat A
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_a.description: An outer coat favored by Outerms. Since it is meant to take incoming attacks, it is reasonably durable.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_b.label: Kakistos Coat B
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_b.description: An outer coat favored by Outerms. Since it is meant to take incoming attacks, it is reasonably durable.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_c.label: Kakistos Coat C
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_c.description: An outer coat favored by Outerms. Since it is meant to take incoming attacks, it is reasonably durable.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_d.label: Kakistos Coat D
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_d.description: An outer coat favored by Outerms. Since it is meant to take incoming attacks, it is reasonably durable.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_e.label: Kakistos Coat E
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Apparel_S_e.description: An outer coat favored by Outerms. Since it is meant to take incoming attacks, it is reasonably durable.
